---
name: Translation contribution
about: Propose or submit a translation of the site
labels: i18n
---

## Target locale

Language tag (e.g., `es`, `fr`, `is`, `de`, `pt`, `ja`, `ar`):

## Are you a native speaker?

Yes / No. If no, who will proof-read?

## Validated instrument translations

For each screener you intend to translate, link to the official validated translation source (Pfizer phqscreeners.com, WHO, NIH HealthMeasures, etc.). The site uses validated translations only — no machine translation of clinical instruments.

## Status

- [ ] `messages/<locale>.json` created
- [ ] Screener configs reference official validated translation source
- [ ] Crisis resources adapted to the locale's country (helpline numbers, etc.)
- [ ] Reviewed by a native speaker
